overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy historic city resembling Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2. The player character walks along cobblestone streets, ascends to a covered balcony walkway with period NPCs, and explores a formal garden courtyard with an equestrian statue. The atmosphere is misty and atmospheric with soft morning light.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy cobblestone street toward a historic building

multi-story brick building with tall windows in the distance
ornate black cast-iron street lamp
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars
corner building with covered balcony and stone facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy dawn street with bare trees and historic brick buildings. The camera moves forward along wet cobblestones, approaching a corner building with an ornate balcony.

beginning to ascend the stone staircase to the upper balcony level

ornate black wrought iron fence along the stairs and balcony
painted sign reading CAFE BALZAC above the balcony

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Cafe Balzac building and begins ascending the exterior stone staircase. The wrought iron railing and balcony structure come into view, with NPCs visible on the upper level.

passing under hanging sign reading CHAMPAGNE

stone columns supporting the balcony roof
rectangular hanging sign with text APERITIFS

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered balcony walkway with stone columns and hanging signs for APERITIFS and CHAMPAGNE. The area is populated with period-dressed NPCs standing and conversing along the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to formal garden courtyard

events.description: exiting the covered balcony into the open courtyard area
entering the formal garden courtyard through iron gates

agents.ego_description: walking along the iron fence and entering the courtyard garden

notable_agents.action: woman in red skirt and white blouse walking ahead into the courtyard

large historic building with domed roof visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a formal garden courtyard enclosed by iron fencing. A large historic mansion with a domed roof and a central equestrian statue become visible through the morning fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden courtyard with central monument

events.description: circling around the central equestrian statue to view it from different angles

agents.ego_description: walking around the statue and through the garden paths, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: man in blue uniform walking toward the statue
woman in white dress walking along the garden path

entered.detail: circular planted beds with flowers around the statue base
wooden benches for seating in the garden

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the impressive equestrian statue in the center of the courtyard, surrounded by palm trees and flower beds. Other pedestrians stroll through the garden as the camera approaches the exit gates.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, narrow city street up into an elevated walkway and finally into an expansive formal garden. It begins by gliding along wet cobblestones past bare trees and brick buildings in the dawn fog, moving steadily toward the ornate exterior of Cafe Balzac. As the camera ascends a stone staircase, the view shifts from the street level to a covered balcony walkway where period-dressed NPCs converse beneath hanging signs for aperitifs and champagne. The scene then opens as the camera exits the covered structure, revealing a grand mansion with a domed roof and a central equestrian statue emerging through the morning haze. Finally, the camera circles the impressive statue amidst palm trees and flower beds before drifting toward the garden's exit gates.
